sect2:
nvchecker-&nvchecker-version;
nvchecker
Introduction to nvchecker Module
The nvchecker module provides a solution for checking versions of packages. Arch Linux and other teams rely on this module for checking for updates to provide the latest software to their users.
Download (HTTP):
Additional Downloads
Recommended patch for updcheck from lfs-tools:
nvchecker Dependencies
Required
, , , and
Recommended
Git, libnotify, PyGObject, and
Installation of nvchecker
The recommended patch gives a longer delay to check against Repology. Repology and other sites of its ilk try to prevent bots from scraping data via a delay. This patch tries to adhere to Repology's limits. If you downloaded the recommended patch, apply it now:
patch -Np1 -i ../nvchecker.diff
Build the module:
&build-wheel;
Now, as the &root; user:
&install-wheel; nvchecker
&pip3-cmd-explain;
Contents
Installed Programs Installed Libraries Installed Directories
nvchecker, nvchecker-ini2toml, nvchecker-notify, nvcmp, and nvtake
None
/usr/lib/python&python3-majorver;/site-packages/nvchecker, /usr/lib/python&python3-majorver;/site-packages/nvchecker-&nvchecker-version;.dist-info, and /usr/lib/python&python3-majorver;/site-packages/nvchecker-source
